extraction.one_line_summary: DE GENDT Thomas soloed to victory from breakaway in final tunnel approach, holding 23 seconds over chasing group led by YATES Simon.
tactical_patterns: DE GENDT Thomas manipulated breakaway companions psychologically, making them believe in collective success before attacking solo late.
UAE Team Emirates unexpectedly joined Movistar's acceleration, signaling wider team ambitions than originally anticipated for this parcours.
YATES Simon's late acceleration neutralized QUINTANA Nairo's headwind attack easily, then immediately shut down pace exposing team confidence hierarchy.
LANGEN Vegard Stake led chase work closing gap from 27s to 19s, revealing UAE's willingness to expend domestique resources.

rider_signals.DE GENDT Thomas: positive: Demonstrated tactical maturity manipulating breakaway dynamics before solo effort, suggesting improved race craft beyond pure climbing power.
rider_signals.YATES Simon: positive: Neutralized QUINTANA's attack in headwind with authority then won sprint from chase group, showing form depth beyond pure climbing.
rider_signals.MARTIN Dan: positive: Positioned aggressively in early tunnel attacks looking comfortable with elbows out, unexpected attacking intent for stage profile.
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: Lightweight attack into headwind easily neutralized by YATES Simon, poor tactical judgment reveals declining race intuition.
rider_signals.VALVERDE Alejandro: neutral: Tagged along on early attacks conservatively, standard positioning without commitment reveals calculated points defense strategy.
rider_signals.IMPEY Daryl: neutral: Identified as Mitchelton-Scott's chosen rider pre-race but invisible in finale, suggesting team miscalculated stage difficulty.
rider_signals.FRANK Mathias: negative: Mentioned as not being part of finale after featuring in early break, fade suggests insufficient depth for sustained efforts.
rider_signals.LAENGEN Vegard Stake: positive: Led sustained chase effort closing significant gap, elevated domestique role indicates UAE's tactical flexibility.
rider_signals.NOVAK Domen: neutral: Added late firepower for Bahrain-Merida but too late, timing suggests team's stage-reading lag behind rivals.
